---
name: Hardware Issue
about: Report a hardware-related problem with T-SIMCAM assembly
title: '[HARDWARE] '
labels: hardware
---

**Hardware Revision:** [e.g., T-SIMCAM v1.6]
**Component:** [e.g., Camera, Motor Driver, Power Supply]

**Description:**
What the hardware issue is.

**Setup:**
- Motor driver DIP switch settings
- Power supply voltage and current
- Connections and wiring

**Observed Behavior:**
What happens (or does not happen).

**Diagnostics:**
Any measurements taken (voltage, current, temperature).
